name: @gwynnnplaine/pi-discord-presence
description_en: Discord Rich Presence for Pi — shows live agent activity (editing, reading, running commands) in your Discord status, with project, model, and a session timer.
description_zh: Pi 的 Discord Rich Presence — 在您的 Discord 状态中显示实时代理活动（编辑、阅读、运行命令），包含项目、模型和会话计时器。
